meta.notes: Full e2e music video generation benchmark. Engine: fal kling (fal-ai/kling-video/o3/pro/reference-to-video). Lipsync: ltx-2.3 (fal-ai/ltx-2.3/audio-to-video). FAL_KEY required — not in default PikaBot env, must be provided by user. Clips generated sequentially (not parallel) — this inflates wall time vs production coordinator+worker architecture. Skill ran directly in main session, not via subagent coordinator.

test_input.name: Abracadabra — Lady Gaga (Apple Music 30s preview)
test_input.description: 30-second Apple Music preview fetched via apple-music-reference skill

task.name: music-video
task.purpose: Generate a 30s music video from Apple Music preview. Engine: fal kling. Lipsync: ltx-2.3. 7 clips (empty × 2, lipsync × 2, character × 2, broll_instrument × 1). Karaoke captions.
task.expected_output: 30s 9:16 MP4 with 7 clips, audio mixed, karaoke captions burned

install.notes: Skill installed manually from git (feat/music-video branch), not via Skill Hub CMS. Pre-installed, no runtime install step.

asset_acquisition.notes: Apple Music preview fetch via apple-music-reference + ffmpeg m4a→mp3 conversion. Sub-1s API call.

steps.name: shot_script_generation
steps.notes: LLM call (claude-haiku-4-5) to generate 7-clip shot script for 30s audio. Includes JSON parse + validation.

steps.name: keyframe_generation
steps.notes: 7 individual Gemini image calls via pika proxy. ~24s per keyframe. Output: 7×9:16 JPGs (avg 1.6MB each) + 1 grid PNG.

steps.name: clip_002_lipsync_ltx23
steps.notes: fal-ai/ltx-2.3/audio-to-video. 4s lipsync clip + audio seg extraction. Output: 3.1MB

steps.name: clip_004_character_kling
steps.notes: fal-ai/kling-video/o3/pro/reference-to-video. 4s character clip. Timing error in JSON but file generated (1.8MB). Likely fal_poll timeout race condition.

steps.name: normalize_concat
steps.notes: ffmpeg normalize all 7 clips to 1080×1920@30fps + concat to single file

steps.name: audio_mix
steps.notes: ffmpeg mux original MP3 audio over concatenated video

steps.name: karaoke_captions
steps.notes: caption_video.py --style karaoke --no-vad via video-captions skill. Whisper transcription + ASS burn.

execution.notes: Sequential clip generation (no coordinator/worker parallelism — benchmark ran in main session). LLM overhead dominated by polling waits between clip generation tool calls.
